---
title: Reference
description: Preset, task, and config-schema tables.
---

Quick tables — the registered symbols and the sweep config schema.

- **`variants()`** — registered node symbols (Falandays family incl. `:falandays_base` / `:falandays_extended`, compartmental, `:sorn`).
- **`tasks()`** — registered task symbols.
- **Sweep config** — `[sweep]` (`mode`, `seeds`, `max_cells`), `[baseline]`, `[axes]` (namespaced paths → value lists), `[analytics]`.

*(Stub — auto-generated tables to be populated from the registries.)*
